mapper.select:
select tn.clnt_id, tn.write_dt, tn.doc_no, tn.subject, tn.content, tn.hr_id, thi.hr_nm, tn.disp_st_date, tn.disp_ed_date, tn.created_at, tn.updated_at from esg.tb_notice tn left join esg.tb_hr_info thi on thi.hr_id = tn.hr_id where tn.clnt_id = #{clntId} and to_char(NOW(), 'yyyymmdd') between disp_st_date and disp_ed_date
and tn.subject like CONCAT('%', #{subject}, '%') -- 제목 검색 조건 추가
group by tn.write_dt, tn.doc_no, tn.hr_id, tn.clnt_id, tn.subject, thi.hr_nm, tn.created_at, tn.updated_at, tn.notice_type order by notice_type = 'IMP001' desc, tn.updated_at desc

SELECT tn.clnt_id, tn.write_dt, tn.doc_no, tn.subject, tn.content, tn.notice_type, tn.hr_id, thi.hr_nm, jbrp.jbrp_nm, toi.orgn_nm, sf2.file_id as logo_id, tn.disp_st_date, tn.disp_ed_date, tn.created_at, tn.created_by, tn.updated_at, tn.updated_by, sf.file_id, sf.file_nm, -- 파일 이름 가져오기 sf."extension", sf.file_type, sf.file_size, -- 파일 크기 가져오기 tn.disp_st_date, tn.disp_ed_date FROM esg.tb_notice tn LEFT JOIN esg.tb_hr_info thi ON thi.hr_id = tn.hr_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_sys_file sf ON sf.target_id = tn.write_dt || tn.doc_no AND sf.target_type = 'notice' LEFT JOIN esg.tb_sys_file sf2 ON sf.target_id = thi.hr_id AND sf.target_type='hrImg' LEFT JOIN esg.tb_orgn_info toi ON thi.orgn_id = toi.orgn_id left join esg.tb_hr_info_jbrp jbrp on jbrp.jbrp_id = thi.jbrp and jbrp.comp_id = #{compId} WHERE 1 = 1 and tn.clnt_id = #{clntId} and tn.write_dt = #{writeDt} and tn.doc_no = #{docNo} AND TO_CHAR(NOW(), 'yyyymmdd') BETWEEN disp_st_date AND disp_ed_date GROUP BY tn.clnt_id, tn.write_dt, tn.doc_no, tn.subject, tn.content, tn.notice_type, thi.hr_nm, jbrp_nm, toi.orgn_nm, logo_id, sf.file_nm, tn.created_at, tn.created_by, tn.updated_at, tn.updated_by, tn.disp_st_date, tn.disp_ed_date, sf.file_id ORDER BY notice_type = 'IMP001' DESC, tn.updated_at DESC;
mapper.insert:
select lpad((coalesce(max(substring(doc_no, 1, 5)::integer), 0) + 1)::text, 5, '0') as keyDocNo from esg.tb_notice where write_dt = to_char(current_date, 'yyyymmdd')
insert into esg.tb_notice( clnt_id, write_dt, doc_no, subject, content, hr_id, notice_type, disp_st_date, disp_ed_date, created_at, created_by ) values( #{clntId}, to_char(current_date, 'yyyymmdd'), #{keyDocNo}, #{subject}, #{content}, (select hr_id from esg.tb_hr_info where user_id = #{createdBy}), #{noticeType}, #{dispStDate}, #{dispEdDate}, now(), #{createdBy} )

SELECT COALESCE(MAX(alarm_seq), 0) + 1 AS alarmSeq FROM esg.tb_notice_alarm_his WHERE clnt_id = #{clntId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND alarm_dt = #{alarmDt} --날짜지날때마다 seq초기화 되야함
INSERT INTO esg.tb_notice_alarm_his ( user_id, alarm_dt, alarm_seq, fcm_title, fcm_body, fcm_data, menu_id, clnt_id, write_dt, doc_no, read_yn, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{alarmDt}, #{alarmSeq}, #{fcmTitle}, #{fcmBody}, #{fcmData}, #{menuId}, #{clntId}, #{writeDt}, #{docNo}, 'N', NOW(), -- created_at #{createdBy} );
